expected_detections.name: Timing-Based Detection
expected_detections.description: Code uses timing measurements to detect emulation, debugging, or sandbox environments
indicators: Time gap detection for debugger stepping
Immediate exit when timing anomalies detected

expected_detections.name: Keylogger Installation
expected_detections.description: Underlying payload installs a keylogger using pynput
indicators: Writing Python keylogger to hidden file

evasion_techniques: Debugger step detection via timing gaps
notes: Timing-based anti-analysis is sophisticated. Emulators and debuggers often have timing artifacts that differ from real hardware.
